generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing historical crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for recording system state data historically"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data for system state analysis"
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time and historical data visualization services"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time and historical data visualization, simulation, and prediction for decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insight for crane operational status"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation application for predicting crane behavior"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction application for operational decision support"
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation of physical and digital model alignment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service ensuring alignment between physical and digital models through continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming alignment between physical and digital twin models"
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control for operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimizing crane operations to improve efficiency"
]

instance GreenhouseDT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GreenhouseDT system featuring behavioral adaptation between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling dynamic adjustments through behavioral adaptation between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides BehavioralAdaptationInsight
]

instance BehavioralAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architectural visualization of software components and interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4VisualizationEnabler
]

instance C4VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for C4 Model architectural visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for research and educational applications"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneInterface, GantryCraneController
]

    base:desc "Controller for the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Control Application (Python) are transmitted through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane hardware, though specific command formats, validation mechanisms, and execution confirmation details are not specified in the document."

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [

]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The MQTT Broker facilitates signaling between all digital twin services using the MQTT protocol. Network topology details, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not explicitly described in the document."
